name: aurafrog
description: Official Aura Frog marketplace - AI-powered development with specialized agents, structured workflows, and self-improving learning system

plugins.name: aura-frog
plugins.description: Portable LLM OS with hierarchical planning (beta.2 — L1+L2 conflict detection, freeze cascade, conflict-arbiter, F6 class). 15 agents, 5-phase TDD + T0-T4 planning, 68 rules, 53 skills, 21 commands, 41 hooks, 6 MCP servers.
